title: Avoid identical expressions in binary operations
description: Using the same value on both sides of binary operators is likely a code defect indicating copy-paste errors or logic mistakes. For mathematical operators, this yields predictable results that should be simplified.
recommendation: Fix the logic error or simplify expressions with identical operands to their predictable results.

noncompliant.description: Using identical expressions on both sides of binary operators, leading to predictable or redundant results.

compliant.description: Using different expressions on each side, creating meaningful operations and comparisons.

checks.message: Rule: Avoid identical expressions in binary operations
